ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for and with Barbara Simon.

Ms. Simon stated that there was no need for another reserve and that they will have the Beneficiaries deal with any tax issues. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). No further reserve will be ordered.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw and Marta Eisenberg for and with Barbara Simon. Michael Walsh (Beneficiary) was also present.

The Court stated that it received consents from Michael's Brothers and Sisters. Mr. Walsh stated that he understood and agreed to waiving accountings and waiving bond. The Court stated that the petition seems to be in order with regard to the fees and the reserve, and suggested filing of an ex parte petition with regard to reducing bond. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Off Calendar

Petition Authorizing Court Supervised Trustee To Market And Sell Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence Exercising Independent Powers Pursuant To Probate Code
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Barbara Simon. Martin Harris (Realtor).

Ms. Simon and Mr. Harris expressed concern about potential buyers not being willing to proceed with the purchase if court confirmation is required. The court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The proceeds must be placed into escrow and an additional bond must be filed before closing. The matter is set for status on December 17, 2007 for the filing of the additional bond and the escrow statement.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Authorizing Court Supervised Trustee To Market And Sell Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, For Order To Enter Listing Agreement For Sale Of Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, Etc.
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for and with trustee/petitioner Barbara Simon. Eileen Walsh and Michael Joseph Walsh are in court. Mr. Walsh questioned if the amount is enough to fix the property. He does not want to have to come back to court if the amount is not enough. Ms. Simon stated she is doing cosmetic repair to stage the home for sale. Ms. Hinshaw also stated it was the realtor Martin Harris' recommendation to spend up to $10,000.00 for the repair. Court can not allow more money without notice to all parties. Ms. Simon stated she will discuss with the family if the cost is over and she will ask for confirmation of her act. Petition is granted as filed. Order signed.
Ms. Hinshaw raised the mediation issue in the conservatorship. If Ms. Hinshaw submits a stipulation to mediation by all parties , Court can refer this matter to conservatorship mediation.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Deborah Neville CSR# 9703. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Saephan.

Petition For Order Authorizing Court Supervised Trustee To Market And Sell Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, For Order To Enter Listing Agreement For Sale Of Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, Etc.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Jul-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Barbara Simon, trustee. Mickey Walsh and Aileen Walsh are both in court. Ms. Simon wanted more time to talk to the other children. Mr. Walsh objected to the continuance and he did not received notice of this hearing or his mother's condition. Matter is continued to 7/2.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Creshon.

Petition For Order Authorizing Court Supervised Trustee To Market And Sell Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, For Order To Enter Listing Agreement For Sale Of Conservatee-Settlor'S Residence, Etc.
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Continued To Jun-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for and with trustee Barbara Simon. Notice was sent to Eileen Walsh's old address. Counsel will need to give notice to Eileen Walsh. The kids want to buy the property. They are in agreement to give the furniture to Eileen. Matter is continued to 6/18.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw and Janet Espey appearing for and with Barbara Simon. Grant Tomioka appearing as court appointed counsel for the conservatee. Eileen Walsh and Michael Walsh are also in court. Petition is granted. Order signed. Additional bond in the amount of $250,000.00 is required. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
